steps.title: Use the beautifying clue
steps.content: The sentence says the romantic style altered subjects to appear more beautiful or heroic than they really were. The blank should mean making positive traits seem greater.

steps.title: Pick the exaggeration verb
steps.content: A means understand or perceive, B means correct, and C means work against or neutralize. Magnify means make more prominent or impressive, matching subjects made more beautiful or heroic. The answer is D.
